qEEG Analyzer.rationale: Added decision-support contract surfacing top-level qc_flags / confidence / method_provenance / limitations on every analysis. Per-feature confidence + method provenance on spectral and asymmetry. PREP-style fallback bad-channel detector when PyPREP missing. Evidence-linkage hook with safe pending fallback (never fabricates citations). Frontend Decision-Support card with observed-vs-inferred separation and evidence-pending chips.
remaining_gaps: Prospective validation against site-specific normative data
Patient-specific EEG-MRI source coregistration
Broader connectivity reproducibility reports across devices
nibabel/pyprep/mne_icalabel/autoreject in baseline dev image (test_source.py blocked locally; production image has them)

MRI / fMRI Analyzer.rationale: Strict upload validator (validation.py) catches malformed NIfTI before pipeline. Brain-age safety wrapper (safe_brain_age) returns 'not_estimable' with reason instead of garbage; ok-path always carries confidence_band_years + calibration_provenance. Per-region structured findings via build_finding/format_observation_text — never says 'diagnosis', always carries requires_clinical_correlation. Fusion-ready payload (mri.v1) + new endpoint /fusion_payload. Schema additions (BrainAgePrediction, NormedValue) are back-compat (Optional / default).
remaining_gaps: Production deployment of FreeSurfer 7.4+/FastSurfer/SynthSeg/antspyx/MRIQC binaries in worker image
Validated age/sex normative volumetric percentile DB
Routine radiologist QC adjudication loop
SHAP/Captum integration for top_contributing_regions (currently empty placeholder)

Risk Scores.rationale: Unified ScoreResponse schema across 8 scores. Validated PROM = PRIMARY anchor, biomarker = SUPPORTING enforced via cap_confidence (no anchor → ceiling 'med'; research-grade → ceiling 'med'). Confidence enum normalised {low, med, high, no_data}. PHQ-9 item 9 ≥ 2 emits BLOCK-severity caution. Audit log on every compute (inputs_hash + model_id + version + confidence). 25/25 contract tests passing.
remaining_gaps: Clinic-specific calibration datasets (Platt/isotonic + reliability diagrams)
External validation by condition + demographic subgroup
PSS-10, MoCA, MMSE rules in assessment_scoring._PREFIX_SCORING (cross-stream handoff to Evidence)
Per-score evidence_refs resolver wiring

Digital Twin / Predictions.rationale: New deeptwin_decision_support module: confidence_tier, derive_top_drivers, soften_language with _FORBIDDEN_TERMS filter, build_provenance with sha256 inputs_hash, build_uncertainty_block (epistemic/aleatoric/calibration honest stub), build_calibration_status (top-level uncalibrated disclosure with no fake numbers), build_scenario_comparison. Top-level provenance + schema_version + decision_support_only on Analyze + Simulate responses. New /scenarios/compare endpoint. UI: decision-support banner + confidence-tier chip + top-drivers + evidence-status chip + expandable provenance card.
remaining_gaps: Real qEEG/MRI feature payload consumption (twin still reads modality flags only — audit A1)
Causal validation + calibration data
Treatment-effect model governance
Server-side scenario persistence (100-cap requires DB migration — out of stream-3 scope tonight)

Decision-support Scores.rationale: Same upgrades as Risk Scores stream — unified ScoreResponse, anchored confidence ceiling, top_contributors, cautions[], evidence_refs[] hook. Aggregator gracefully degrades on missing inputs (no fabrication).
remaining_gaps: Reliability diagrams + calibration monitoring
Cross-modality score reconciliation (qEEG + PROM + MRI + wearable)

Report Generation.rationale: Versioned ReportPayload (schema_id='deepsynaps.report-payload/v1'), CitationRef + InterpretationItem + SuggestedAction + ReportSection. Visual + structural separation observed/interpretation/suggested-action in clinician + patient views. Evidence-strength badges per claim with 'Evidence pending' honest fallback. Citations preserve raw_text on lookup miss. Three new endpoints: preview-payload, payload, render?format=html|pdf (PDF returns clean 503 when weasyprint missing — never blank). Frontend protocol-builder card with audience toggle + loading/empty/error/503 states.
remaining_gaps: WeasyPrint declared in apps/api/pyproject.toml (currently only in render-engine import)
DOCX export wiring (python-docx renderers exist but unwired)
Per-claim citation fidelity tests

Evidence / Citation Layer.rationale: enrich_citations never fabricates — DOI/PMID resolved against literature index, fallback returns status='unverified' with raw_text preserved. Evidence-strength inference reads packages/evidence GRADE letters (read-only; Scoring stream owns it tonight). qEEG clinical_summary now calls search_papers if importable, marks evidence_pending with reason otherwise.
remaining_gaps: Counter-evidence retrieval per recommendation
Claim-level citation fidelity tests in render output
Per-score evidence_refs resolver (cross-stream handoff)

Multimodal Fusion Layer.rationale: Producer side now ready: MRI emits stable mri.v1 fusion payload via /fusion_payload endpoint. qEEG decision-support contract gives fusion-side a stable shape to consume. Fusion router itself was OFF-LIMITS this shift (per task board); 2 pre-existing test failures remain (router does not emit 'limitations' key tests expect).
remaining_gaps: Fusion router itself: emit limitations[] (fixes 2 pre-existing test failures)
Validated late-fusion model with calibration
Timeline-aware subject-level fusion
Patient-specific EEG-MRI source integration

Confidence / Uncertainty Layer.rationale: Now load-bearing in code: every score has cap_confidence policy; every twin response has 3-component uncertainty block (honest stub when components unavailable, never fake numbers); every brain-age has confidence_band_years + calibration_provenance; every qEEG feature has confidence flag + method_provenance.
remaining_gaps: Conformal prediction or calibrated uncertainty where validated models exist
Continuous monitoring of confidence-vs-outcome calibration
MC-dropout / ensembling for epistemic uncertainty (currently labelled 'unavailable')

Explainability Layer.rationale: DeepTwin derive_top_drivers binds explanations to patient-specific request inputs (no longer hard-coded 4 items). Scoring exposes top_contributors[{feature, weight, direction}] in unified schema. MRI BrainAgePrediction adds top_contributing_regions field (placeholder, awaiting SHAP/Captum).
remaining_gaps: SHAP/Captum integration for MRI top_contributing_regions
SHAP/GradCAM for any validated deployed model
Clinician-facing visual explanations for MRI model outputs

API / Serving Architecture.rationale: 5 new endpoints introduced (/clinical-scores, /scenarios/compare, /fusion_payload, /preview-payload + /payload + /render). All response payloads versioned with schema_id + schema_version. All payloads now decision-support-disclaimer-stamped where appropriate. PDF endpoint returns clean 503 when lib missing rather than silent failure.
remaining_gaps: OpenAPI examples for new clinical summary blocks
Service-level observability for analyzer confidence + failure rates
Versioned schemas for ALL analyzer outputs (not just the new ones)

_summary.smallest_gainer: Multimodal Fusion Layer (+0.5 — fusion router itself was off-limits this shift)
_summary.tests_added_this_shift: 100+ contract tests across qEEG, MRI, DeepTwin, Scoring, Reports
